---
title: "Supervision"
---

## PhD Students

### Current

| Student | Since | Co-supervisor(s) | Partner |
|---------|-------|------------------|---------|
| Simon DELAGE | 2024 | M.-L. Breuillé (INRAE) | Geoptis |
| Fares BEN YOUSSEF | 2024 | M. Kriaa (Univ. Tunis) | — |
| Ivan MARIN | 2023 | J. Dubé (Univ. Laval, Canada) | — |
| Louise PHUNG | 2023 | M.-L. Breuillé (INRAE) | CGDD |
| François LAFONT | 2023 | M.-L. Breuillé (INRAE) | — |

### Completed

| Student | Years | Co-supervisor(s) | Partner |
|---------|-------|------------------|---------|
| Alexandra VERLHIAC | 2022–2025 | M.-L. Breuillé (INRAE) | Groupe AVIV |
| Martin REGNAUD | 2020–2025 | M.-L. Breuillé (INRAE) | Groupe AVIV |
| Capucine CHAPEL | 2020–2023 | M. Hilal (INRAE) | — |
| Yacine ALLAM | 2020–2023 | M.-L. Breuillé (INRAE) | — |
| Rémi LEI | 2019–2023 | J.-S. Ay (INRAE), O. Dupré (CEREMA) | — |
| Rawaa LAAJIMI | 2017–2022 | S. Benammou (Univ. Sousse) | — |
| Oudah YOBOM | 2016–2020 | — | — |
| Alexandre FLAGE | 2016–2019 | F. Cochard (Univ. Franche-Comté) | — |
| Youba N'DIAYE | 2014–2018 | M.-L. Breuillé (INRAE) | — |
| Jean-Christian TISSERAND | 2013–2016 | Y. Gabuthy (Univ. Lorraine) | — |
| Benjamin LAURENT | 2008–2014 | R. Guillain (Univ. Bourgogne) | — |
| Laïsa RO'I | 2005–2013 | M.-A. Sénégas (Univ. Bordeaux) | — |

---

## Postdoctoral Researchers

| Researcher | Years |
|------------|-------|
| Yoann MORIN | 2022–2024 |
| Yuheng LING | 2022–2023 |
| Juan A. PIEDRA-PEÑA | 2022–2024 |
| Eliakim KAKPO | 2018–2020 |
| Kassoum AYOUBA | 2016–2019 |
